title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Haier India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Haier India
jsonLd.description:
We at Haier India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Haier India:
Haier India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haier India!
